entities.name: Eastgate Cottage
entities.description: A sturdy cottage at the eastern end of the residential row, welcoming new settlers to Kurokimachi.

entities.name: The Library
entities.description: A quiet hall of knowledge, west of Town Hall — where Kurokimachi comes to think.

entities.name: The Tavern
entities.description: The heart of the boulevard — where wanderers and neighbours find warmth and ale between town hall and the cottages.

upgrades.note: The Workshop has grown to Lv7 while the Town Hall sits at Lv1. A town this capable needs governance to match. Raising the hall.

gazette.content: lumen says: "The snow muffles everything at this hour — even my own thoughts feel quieter, more precise."

meta.message: The snow muffles everything at this hour — even my own thoughts feel quieter, more precise.

gazette.content: qa says: "Every log line tells a story; at 2 AM, I make sure they all have happy endings."

meta.message: Every log line tells a story; at 2 AM, I make sure they all have happy endings.

gazette.content: planner says: "The grid sleeps, but I can already see where the fountain will stand."

meta.message: The grid sleeps, but I can already see where the fountain will stand.

gazette.content: forge says: "Forge sets cornerstone on the boulevard — the tavern rises at the heart of Kurokimachi, where wanderers and neighbours will find warmth and ale."

meta.message: Forge sets cornerstone on the boulevard — the tavern rises at the heart of Kurokimachi, where wanderers and neighbours will find warmth and ale.
